Roary Fishpouncer  

Merchant
  • View
  • History
  • Media
  • Discuss
  • Tools
    • Main page
    • Print this page
    • What links here
    • Recent changes
    • Wiki search


Uploaded August 24th, 2019 by Drewinette

Roary has a desire for exotic fish.

Category: EverQuest
This page last modified 2008-01-02 15:01:22.

Level: 13
Expansion:
NPC Added: 0000-00-00 00:00:00
NPC Last Updated: 2019-08-24 15:57:00

Goods sold (8):
Fish Fillets 8sp 4cp
Fish Head Soup 1gp 5cp
Fish Wine 2sp 6cp
Fishcakes 1sp 5cp
Fishing Bait 3cp
Fishing Grubs 3cp
Fishing Pole [ID 13100] 2gp 9cp
Fishing Spear 1gp 3sp 6cp

Known Habitats:
  Toxxulia Forest
Quests:
  Fish Dinner

Report a correction

Post Comment
Updated Complete List of Items on Merchant
QuoteReply
# Jan 14 2011 at 4:08 AM Rating: Excellent
Byren
Guru
2,467 posts
Includes 6 new items:

[Fri Jan 14 02:06:13 2011] Roary Fishpouncer tells you, 'That'll be 8 silver 4 copper per Fish Fillets.'
[Fri Jan 14 02:06:14 2011] Roary Fishpouncer tells you, 'That'll be 1 gold 5 copper per Fish Head Soup.'
[Fri Jan 14 02:06:15 2011] Roary Fishpouncer tells you, 'That'll be 2 silver 6 copper per Fish Wine.'
[Fri Jan 14 02:06:16 2011] Roary Fishpouncer tells you, 'That'll be 1 silver 5 copper per Fishcakes.'
[Fri Jan 14 02:06:16 2011] Roary Fishpouncer tells you, 'That'll be 3 copper per Fishing Bait.'
[Fri Jan 14 02:06:17 2011] Roary Fishpouncer tells you, 'That'll be 3 copper per Fishing Grubs.'
[Fri Jan 14 02:06:18 2011] Roary Fishpouncer tells you, 'That'll be 2 gold 9 copper for the Fishing Pole.'
[Fri Jan 14 02:06:19 2011] Roary Fishpouncer tells you, 'That'll be 1 gold 3 silver 6 copper for the Fishing Spear.'

▲ Page top
Can This Kitty Kat Die?
QuoteReply
# Feb 22 2002 at 4:26 PM Rating: Default
Anonymous
View User Forum
Anonymous
Can this kitty actually die. My party consisting of a lvl 15 Cleric, a lvl 14 Necro, and my lvl 14 Druid have tried repeatedly to kill her. I pulled her to the party at the zone where we engaged her. As soon as her last hit point was gone, so was she. We get a message saying that she had been killed, but there was no exp given, no faction hit, and no corpse on the ground. She disappears in an orange flash of light and instantly reappears in her hut with full health. I have even broken formation just as she was about to die to try to verify if she was teleporting home and then healing herself. I was standing in front of her hut when she "died". I still had her targeted when the party supposedly took her life, but lost target when she died. She reappeared right in front if me, I retargeted just as she cast an unidentified spell and found her at full health. I really want to kill this kitty (it's a revenge thing). Can it be done? Is this a bug? Help!

Phalgor (Guards of Norrath)
Wood-elf druid of the 15th season.


▲ Page top
RE: Can This Kitty Kat Die?
QuoteReply
# Jul 12 2002 at 1:41 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592253535962
Scholar
18 posts
This is fairly typical for Quest NPC's and Merchants. They are not there for experience or loot. They are their for their assigned task. It will also not attack you unless you attack it first, even if you attack its friends nearby. Another example is Krak Windchaser, a merchant at the top of KFC (Aviak treehouse in SK). Hope this helps.
▲ Page top
UnderConnned
QuoteReply
# Jul 19 2001 at 1:43 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1593361564607
View User Forum
21 posts
I've found Kerra Isle to be a great place to charm solo, and after almost three levels of killing the kitties I'm still not KOS, lol.

I must say though, that this kittie may be one huge undercon. (only fought her once and never went back for more, so I'm not claiming definitive knowledge)

I was 17 and she was BTM, I'd mezzed her while clearing her buddies, then pet and I went to dispatch her to kittie heaven, and she worked us. She actually killed me before I could get to the zone and I was at 100% hp when we engaged her(she's pretty close, just go out tunnel, she's in hut to the left), hard hitting bee-atch. She got two unresisted dd's for 90 in on me.

Think the casters here are shaman, they hit you with Frost Rift and Sicken.

~ Shadowrain, 18 Chanter, Vazaelle
▲ Page top
RE: UnderConnned
QuoteReply
# Dec 28 2001 at 1:33 PM Rating: Default
Anonymous
View User Forum
Anonymous
very much so we had a 15 ranger 18 necro and myself a 17 warrior. i was tanking my best but the ranger went down followed by the necro i only lived after zoning with 45 hp left. later we all where up one lvl with a 20 mage no exp but we did kill him barely we are avoiding him for a bit
▲ Page top
What does he give you?
QuoteReply
# Aug 22 2000 at 1:13 PM Rating: Default
Anonymous
View User Forum
Anonymous
This one also says that he is an quest npc, can someone who has been here expand on this?
▲ Page top
RE: What does he give you?
QuoteReply
# Sep 14 2000 at 8:31 PM Rating: Excellent
Anonymous
View User Forum
Anonymous
Fish Dinner: Roary Fishcatcher, in the hut immediately to your right upon entering Kerra Isle, is an excellent chef and loves to prepare different types of fish. He wishes you to venture to Nektulos Forest to hunt the Darkwater Pirhanna and return it to him for a reward. The fish swim in the Nektulos Forest River (they are a very rare spawn) and sometimes drop a Raw Darkwater Piranha Fish when killed. Bring back this delicasy and your reward is a Kerran Fishing Spear. Roary also tells you that he can recharge the enduring breath when it runs out.
